title: citrus × ponki
intro: Citrus × ponki, also known as the Ponkan or Ponki, is a citrus hybrid plant that is a cross between a sour orange (Citrus × aurantium) and a mandarin (Citrus reticulata). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, antiviral, and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful in treating a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Citrus × ponki include reducing fever, relieving cough and cold symptoms, and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of Citrus × ponki include teas, infusions, and juices that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
